metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_420
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 1 colocalization of CDKL5 with PSD-95, coimmunoprecipitation of CDKL5 with PSD-95 but not with Synaptophysin.
Fig. 3 localization of CDKL5 to synapses depend on PSD-95
Fig. S2 CDKL5 is enriched in the PSD fraction

14/4/2017 Pim
Fig.S1 (binding of recombinant PSD-95 and CDKL5) shows that the interaction of these proteins is direct. This places CDKL5 in the same cellular compartment as PSD-95 --> postsynapse.. Experimental description: Experiments with coltured neurons and biochemical analisys are form rat. These experiments are featured in Fig. 1, 3 and S2.

Literal from M&M
"Cell Cultures and Transfection. Cultures of cortical neurons were
prepared from E18 Sprague-Dawley (SD) rat"
"Affinity Purification of CDKL5-Interacting Proteins. Rat synaptosomes
were purified according to the procedures described previously"
